description: Rewrite 5 fake QuantMax components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: MatchProfile, SafetyOverlay, SwipeCard, VideoChatRoom, VideoFeed.
steps: Read apps/quantmax/src/types/index.ts to understand UserProfile, MatchAction, VideoChat, VerificationStatus, etc.
Rewrite apps/quantmax/src/components/MatchProfile.tsx: Convert to JSX profile card with compatibility score, photo, name/age, bio, and message/unmatch action buttons.
Rewrite apps/quantmax/src/components/SafetyOverlay.tsx: Convert to JSX safety/reporting overlay component.

Rewrite apps/quantmax/src/components/SwipeCard.tsx: Convert to JSX swipe card with animated transforms, profile image, swipe indicators (LIKE/NOPE/SUPER LIKE), profile info footer, and action buttons.
Rewrite apps/quantmax/src/components/VideoChatRoom.tsx: Convert to JSX video chat room with connection bar, remote/local video areas, and control bar (camera/mic/skip/end/report buttons).
Rewrite apps/quantmax/src/components/VideoFeed.tsx: Convert to JSX video feed component.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantmax` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 QuantMax files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 5 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
findings: All 5 components converted cleanly. Unused props handled via destructuring rename (onScreenshot: _onScreenshot, targetUserId: _targetUserId, onScroll: _onScroll) to satisfy noUnusedParameters. Pre-existing typecheck errors exist in other quantmax files (pages, hooks, services) but none in the 5 target components. SwipeCard uses CSSProperties import for getSwipeStyle helper return type.
